violations.text: 1 door lowboy located (behind front counter) area was not in good repair. Lowboy ambient temp. 52-58 degrees Fahrenheit (no TCS foods in lowboy at time of inspection). Lowboy shall not be used for TCS foods until serviced and maintains temp. of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Observed dumpster area with debris. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE/dumpster, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items and clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
The floor tiles throughout the back kitchen area are in poor repair (grout missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

The floor and wall juncture next to right side door entrance to the (kitchen area) does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The floors behind and underneath equipment in front/back kitchen area and bar area have an accumulation of food debris and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixer, spatula, pizza cutter, etc.) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The following in-use utensils were improperly stored: 1) Scoops observed stored with handle in direct contact with food 2) Tongs observed stored on unclean surface (cabinet door) In use utensils must be stored in/on clean dry locations between uses Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The right handle of a hand washing sink faucet was observed in poor repair (not dispensing water). New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink in bar area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the inside of several refrigeration units have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The floor tiles throughout the back kitchen area are in poor repair (grout missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

The door to the outside, located in the delivery area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
The dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Dumpster area to be maintained and cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
